description: Crafted from the finest washed cow leather, the timberland men's Sauvage Large Flap wallet is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a grainy, rustic finish, this wallet has an embossed branding on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use.Dimensions: 13 cm X 9.5 cm100% washed cow leather for flexibility and supplenessTwo main compartments with fabric inner liningBig flap on the front right half with multiple partitions to hold cards and paper currencyMultiple partitions on the front left half CareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
